title: Blast protection indicator
description: A mod for displaying dressed leggings for explosion resistance. It helps to understand when greaves are worn for blast protection . There is a setting: transparency, position, on and off. I recommend using it with Centered Crosshair, ModMenu
body: A mod for displaying dressed greaves for blast protection. It helps to understand when greaves are worn for explosion resistance. There is a setting: transparency, position, on and off. I recommend using it with Centered Crosshair and ModMenu
